description_long: This is a classic portable fire extinguisher with a cylindrical red metal body and a slightly domed top. The extinguisher features a prominent red handle and lever mechanism at the top, with a black hose attached near the handle and curving downward, ending in a tapered nozzle. The front of the cylinder displays a white flame icon and the word 'ONEBONSAI' in bold white letters, along with a circular logo. The base of the extinguisher is slightly wider, providing stability when placed upright. The surface is smooth and glossy, with all components appearing robust and functional for emergency use.
description: A red cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black hose, red handle, and white flame icon and text on the front. The surface is smooth and glossy, with a sturdy, stable base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white flame icon, 'ONEBONSAI' text, and the full length of the black hose curving to the right.
description_view_1: Rear view with the black hose running straight down the back, obscuring most of the label and front details.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the cylindrical body, red handle, and the black hose curving outward and downward.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the back of the extinguisher, with the handle and top mechanism visible but label partially hidden.
attribute_label_or_signage: White flame icon and 'ONEBONSAI' text with a circular logo on the front of the cylinder.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black hose is attached near the top, curving downward and ending in a tapered nozzle; the hose is flexible and not secured to the body.
